sla.title: SLAs
sla.description: Define service level agreements to ensure issues are resolved within target timeframes.
sla.planGateDesc: SLA policies are available on the Business and Enterprise plans. Upgrade to set response and resolution targets, and get alerts when they are breached.
sla.automationDesc: Trigger actions automatically when SLA thresholds are reached or breached.
sla.emptyRulesDesc: Add an automation rule to act on SLA events.
